● Done! Here's what happened:

  Hub created with 3 agents:

   - ivory-avocet (leader/me) — coordinated and synthesized
   - Design Researcher — contributed adoption, governance, and measurement principles
   - Systems Architect — contributed token architecture, versioning, and migration
  strategies

  Final deliverable → markdown-3dytrq on the canvas — a 6-section guide covering
  token-first architecture, evolutionary design, friction-free adoption,
  contribution-based governance, first-class versioning, and adoption metrics.
